name: Quanterix Corp
summary: PART I Overview We are a life sciences company transforming healthcare innovation by accelerating biomarker breakthroughs from discovery to diagnostics using our ultra-sensitive translational research and spatial biology instruments, consumables, and services. We continue to invest in pushing a paradigm shift in healthcare from an emphasis on later-stage treatment to a focus on earlier detection, monitoring, prognosis, and, ultimately, prevention.
